title: Fresh Linen & White Floral Candle – Hand-Poured Soy & Coconut Wax | 30hr Burn | Amber Jar (108ml) | Clean & Calming Aromatherapy Gift for Home & Bedroom
features: 🔹 Clean, Fresh & Floral Scent A light blend of fresh linen and delicate white florals — perfect for creating a calming, airy atmosphere in any room.
🔹 Natural Soy & Coconut Wax Crafted in small batches using a sustainable wax blend and cotton wick for a clean, toxin-free burn.
🔹 Long-Lasting Calm Enjoy up to 30 hours of soft fragrance and warm glow in a minimalist amber glass jar.
🔹 Elegant Amber Jar (108ml) Designed to complement any space — ideal for bedrooms, living rooms, or home office zen.
🔹 A Calming Gift for Any Occasion Thoughtfully hand-poured and beautifully scented — perfect for birthdays, thank-you gifts, or personal moments of peace.
description: Product description Bring a breath of fresh air into your home with our Fresh Linen & White Floral Candle — a delicate, hand-poured blend that evokes the crisp, comforting scent of freshly washed linens and blooming florals. Made from a clean-burning soy and coconut wax blend, it offers up to 30 hours of serene fragrance in a timeless amber jar that fits beautifully in any space. Whether you're unwinding after a long day or creating a calm morning ritual, this candle adds a sense of clarity, softness, and peace. Ideal as a soothing gift or a personal self-care treat, it's a simple way to bring calm into your every day. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Burn within sight. Never burn for more than 4 hours at a time. Discontinue use when 1/2 inch of wax remains. Place on a heat-resistant surface. Keep out of reach of children and pets.

specifications_table.Special features: ‎Long Burning, Odour Eliminator, Scented, Clean Burn, Non Toxic
